title: story.heartbeat
description: Emitted by story-task-progress.js after each Task close inside a Story's implementation loop. Surfaces the in-progress Story as an inspectable ledger event so /epic-deliver's host-loop reconciler can confirm that a long Story is still making forward progress between dispatch and merge — distinct from story.dispatch.start (one per Story per attempt) and story.merged (one per Story per close). Payload carries the closing Task id so retros can reconstruct per-Task wall-clock cadence.
